name: PENTAIR plc
business: Pentair designs, manufactures and sells fluid treatment and pump products, water treatment systems, and pool equipment. It serves residential, commercial, industrial, agricultural, and food and beverage markets through wholesale and retail distribution. The company operates through three segments: Flow, Water Solutions, and Pool.

exposures.sentence: These products and systems are used in a range of applications, including fluid delivery, ion exchange, desalination, food and beverage, separation technologies for the oil and gas industry, residential and municipal wells, water treatment, wastewater solids handling, pressure boosting, circulation and transfer, fire suppression, flood control, agricultural irrigation and crop spray.

This segment designs, manufactures and sells commercial and residential water treatment products and systems including pressure tanks, control valves, activated carbon products, commercial ice machines, conventional filtration products, and point-of-entry and point-of-use water treatment systems.
These products and systems are used in a range of applications, including ... separation technologies for the oil and gas industry.

If operations at any of our manufacturing facilities or those of our suppliers were to be disrupted as a result of significant equipment failures, natural disasters, earthquakes, power outages, fires, explosions, terrorism, political disputes, international hostilities, military conflicts, cybersecurity incidents, adverse weather conditions, labor disputes, public health epidemics or pandemics or other catastrophic events or disruptions outside of our control, we may be unable to fill customer orders and otherwise meet customer demand for our products.
These products and systems are used in a range of applications, including ... food and beverage.
Another approximately 30% of Flow sales were from the commercial and infrastructure flow businesses, which sell larger pumps focused on fire suppression, water supply, wastewater and flood control.

catalysts.sentence: On September 17, 2025, as part of our Flow reportable segment, we completed the acquisition of Hydra-Stop, LLC ( Hydra-Stop ) for $292.1 million in cash, net of cash acquired, and subject to customary adjustments.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of G & F Manufacturing completed
catalysts.sentence: In December 2024, as part of our Pool reportable segment, we completed the acquisition of G & F Manufacturing, LLC ( G & F Manufacturing ) for $116.0 million in cash, net of cash acquired.

catalysts.event: U.S. Supreme Court strikes down certain tariffs
catalysts.sentence: In addition, on February 20, 2026, the U.S. Supreme Court struck down certain tariffs imposed under the International Emergency Powers Act.

On December 15, 2025, the Board of Directors approved a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.27 per share that was paid on February 6, 2026 to shareholders of record at the close of business on January 23, 2026.

catalysts.event: Board authorizes $1.0 billion share repurchase program
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, the Board of Directors authorized the repurchase of our ordinary shares up to a maximum dollar limit of $1.0 billion (the 2025 Authorization ).
